item.name: Sawshark
item.description:
With its saw-shaped snout, one would be hard-pressed to consider this shark inconspicuous.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: According to Far Eastern legend, when the kami built the very first shrine, it was this shark's convenient snout that they borrowed to do so. This being the case, it enjoys massive popularity among carpenters as a token of good fortune─fortune that presumably does not extend to the creature itself.
